allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; $env:PATH -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node" })

PowerShell(Get-Command node, npm, npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; ls "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; ls "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)
